title: Nanoporo Direct RNA Sequencing
author: Opentrons
description: For a detailed description of this protocol, please refer to the [Nanoporo Direct RNA sequencing (SQK-RNA002) SOP](https://opentrons-protocol-library-website.s3.amazonaws.com/custom-README-images/onsite_egenesis/direct-rna-sequencing-sqk-rna002-DRS_9080_v2_revO_14Aug2019-minion+(2).pdf). Note: wash buffer should be split evenly between wells A5 and A6 on slot 5.
steps_raw: For a detailed description of this protocol, please refer to the [Nanoporo Direct RNA sequencing (SQK-RNA002) SOP](https://opentrons-protocol-library-website.s3.amazonaws.com/custom-README-images/onsite_egenesis/direct-rna-sequencing-sqk-rna002-DRS_9080_v2_revO_14Aug2019-minion+(2).pdf). Note: wash buffer should be split evenly between wells A5 and A6 on slot 5.
Pause for user to thermocycle sample plate.
Mix samples, aspirate sample into tip, incubate at top of the well for 1 minutes, repeat 4 times.
materials_raw: Opentrons 24 Well Aluminum Block with NEST 1.5 mL Screwcap
Opentrons P20 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
